creator: glenn@elaw.org
text:
When attempting to install the net/openldap24-client port, during the "make install" the port attempts to call shtool with a "-c" option, which returns an error:

./../build/shtool -c /usr/local/lib/-c
./../build/shtool:Error: unknown option `-c'
./../build/shtool:Hint:  run `../../build/shtool -h' for usage
*** Error code 1

How-To-Repeat: from /usr/ports/net/openldap24-client/ run:
  make
  make install
